description.en: Automatically assigns IP addresses and network configuration to hosts. Uses a four-step DORA process (Discover, Offer, Request, Acknowledge) over UDP ports 67/68.
description.zh: 自动为主机分配IP地址和网络配置。通过UDP 67/68端口使用四步DORA流程（发现、提供、请求、确认）。

op.en: Message type (1=BOOTREQUEST from client, 2=BOOTREPLY from server)
op.zh: 消息类型 (1=客户端请求, 2=服务器应答)

hlen.en: Hardware address length (6 for Ethernet MAC)
hlen.zh: 硬件地址长度 (以太网MAC为6)

secs.en: Seconds elapsed since client began address acquisition
secs.zh: 客户端开始获取地址后经过的秒数

ciaddr.en: Client IP address (filled if client has valid IP)
ciaddr.zh: 客户端IP地址 (客户端已有有效IP时填写)

yiaddr.en: Your (client) IP address assigned by server
yiaddr.zh: 服务器分配给客户端的IP地址

siaddr.en: Next server IP address for bootstrap
siaddr.zh: 引导用的下一个服务器IP地址

chaddr.zh: 客户端硬件地址 (16字节，填充)

sname.zh: 服务器主机名 (64字节，空字符结尾)

file.zh: 引导文件名 (128字节，空字符结尾)

options.en: DHCP options (variable length, starts with magic cookie 0x63825363)
options.zh: DHCP选项 (变长，以魔术字 0x63825363 开头)
